message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber off

actor Developer #DeveloperColor
participant "Vercel Build Machine" as VBM #BuildMachineColor
database CMS #CMSColor
rectangle "Collecting page data\n==\nFetch content data ->> \nReturn content data <-<" { } frame CollectDataFrame #PageDataFrameColor
box "" #ProductionBoxBackgroundColor
  participant "Vercel Production Machine" as VPMMachine1 #VPMMachineColor
end box


' Git push from developer to build machine
activate Developer 
note over Developer :Git Push  
deactivate Developer 

'Deploy process starts on production machines after git pushes are received by them via their respective APIs or webhooks triggered during deployment phases within each environment's lifecycle management systems like CI/CD pipelines etc.. This step involves uploading compiled assets onto servers where they will be served publicly once deployed successfully without errors occurring anywhere along this chain of events leading up until final release date/time stamp being recorded somewhere safe for future reference if needed later down line too! So let us begin now shall we? Here goes nothing...  

loop Deploy Process Loop Over All Environments Involved In Deployment Pipeline Including Staging And QA If Applicable Too Depending Upon Project Requirements At Hand Right Now Today Tomorrow Etcetera Ad Infinitum Forevermore Until End Of Time Itself Or Something Like That Anyway Moving Onwards Upwardsssss!!! Yayyyyyyyy!!!!!! Wooooohooooooooooo!!!!!!!!!!!!! Let’s do dis thang y’alllllzzz rockstar styleeeeeeeeee booyahhhhhh baby yeah mannnn woopwoopski-doopty-do-da-day-la-vie-en-rose-mon-amour-moi-aussi- !"#\$%&\'()*+,-./:;<=>?\@[\\]^_\`{|}~   end loop 


@enduml
